Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
All laboratory values are within or very close to normal ranges, except for a mildly elevated chloride and slightly decreased total CO₂, which may suggest mild metabolic acidosis or compensation but are not clinically significant in isolation. Renal, glycemic, and lipid profiles are unremarkable. No acute laboratory concerns identified. Recommend clinical correlation.
